Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-03_04-38-06_game-of-life-prose_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Failing test: "should keep a living cell alive when it has two live neighbors"
Expected behavior: A horizontal blinker - input is 3 cells in a row ["0,0", "1,0", "2,0"], output should be vertical blinker ["1,0", "1,1", "1,-1"]. The middle cell (1,0) has 2 live neighbors and survives. The cells (1,1) and (1,-1) are dead but each have exactly 3 neighbors (all of 0,0, 1,0, 2,0) so they become alive. The end cells (0,0) and (2,0) each have only 1 neighbor and die.
Current error: AssertionError - Expected Set{"1,0", "1,1", "1,-1"}, Received Set{}
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-03_04-38-06_game-of-life-prose_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts

Note: This test exercises both survival (rule 2: 2 neighbors live) AND reproduction (rule 4: dead cell with 3 neighbors becomes alive). Implement the full Conway rules generally to make this pass.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text:
All tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Implemented full Conway's Game of Life rules using a neighbor-counting approach. For each live cell, increment counts for all 8 neighbor positions. A cell appears in the next generation if it has exactly 3 neighbors (reproduction or survival) OR has exactly 2 neighbors AND was alive (survival).
**Result**: All tests now pass (4 passing, 4 todo)
**Approach**: While this implementation is more general than absolute minimum, the test note explicitly required implementing the full Conway rules (both survival rule 2 and reproduction rule 4). The neighbor-counting approach naturally handles both rules and only iterates over relevant cells (live cells and their neighbors), avoiding any unnecessary complexity.

Implementation file: `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-03_04-38-06_game-of-life-prose_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts`

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
